results.title: Over 80% of NMDC Balika Shiksha Yojana Beneficiaries Return to Chhattisgarh as Nurses
results.description: More than 80% of girls supported under the NMDC Balika Shiksha Yojana have returned to Chhattisgarh to work as nurses, strengthening healthcare services in their home communities.

results.title: OPEC+ approves modest August production increase amid price slide
results.description: NEW YORK CITY, New York: Seven members of the OPEC+ alliance have agreed to modestly increase oil production in August, extending a series of monthly output hikes as crude prices continue to fall from highs reached during the recent conflict involving Iran.
